headline: Costco Faces Summer Price Fight
summary: Walmart and Kroger are cutting prices as grocery competition heats up.

headline: The Friday Checkout: Will Giant Eagle keep its personality under Kroger?
summary: The nation's largest supermarket operator will need to strike a careful balance to avoid diminishing the Pittsburgh-based chain's distinct look and feel.
